title: SpaceX Prepares for Historic Stock Market Debut
subtitle: The space company aims to raise billions while Elon Musk moves closer to becoming the world's first trillionaire.

summary.en: SpaceX has officially announced plans to enter the public stock market. The company hopes to raise $75 billion to fund its ambitious space exploration goals. These goals include building cities on Mars and launching AI data centers into orbit. Despite high costs and recent losses, the firm remains a leader in the rocket industry. The success of this move may depend on the performance of its massive Starship rocket.
summary.zh: SpaceX 已正式宣布計畫進入公開股票市場。該公司希望籌集 750 億美元，以資助其雄心勃勃的太空探索目標。這些目標包括在火星上建立城市，以及將人工智慧資料中心送入軌道。儘管成本高昂且近期出現虧損，該公司仍然是火箭產業的領導者。這次行動的成功可能取決於其巨型星艦火箭的表現。

paragraphs.en: SpaceX, the aerospace company led by Elon Musk, has revealed plans to go public in the United States. This move, known as an initial public offering (IPO) — when a private company first sells shares to the public — is expected to be the largest in the history of Wall Street. According to BBC Business, the company plans to raise roughly $75 billion from new investors. This could value the entire firm at up to $1.75 trillion.
paragraphs.zh: 由伊隆·馬斯克（Elon Musk）領導的航太公司 SpaceX，已揭露在美國公開上市的計畫。這項被稱為首次公開募股（IPO）的行動，即一家私人企業首次向大眾出售股份，預計將成為華爾街歷史上規模最大的一次。根據英國廣播公司商業新聞（BBC Business）報導，該公司計畫從新投資人手中籌集約 750 億美元，這可能使整間公司的估值高達 1.75 兆美元。

paragraphs.en: For many years, SpaceX has remained a private company. However, the new financial documents show that the business is now ready to open its doors to outside investors. While the company is famous for its reusable rockets and the Starlink satellite internet service, it is also currently losing money. BBC Business reports that SpaceX had a net loss of $4.3 billion in the first three months of this year alone. Despite these losses, experts remain optimistic. Ruth Foxe-Blader of Citrine Venture Partners told the BBC that it is not shocking for a project of this size to be losing money before an IPO, noting that the company has many exciting selling points.
paragraphs.zh: 多年來，SpaceX 一直是私人公司。然而，新的財務文件顯示，該公司現在已準備好向外部投資人開放。儘管該公司以其可重複使用的火箭和星鏈（Starlink）衛星網路服務聞名，但目前仍處於虧損狀態。英國廣播公司商業新聞報導，SpaceX 光是今年前三個月就淨虧損了 43 億美元。儘管有這些虧損，專家們仍然保持樂觀。Citrine Venture Partners 的露絲·福克斯-布萊德（Ruth Foxe-Blader）告訴英國廣播公司，對於如此規模的專案在首次公開募股前虧損並不令人震驚，並指出該公司有許多令人興奮的賣點。

paragraphs.en: At the center of this financial plan is the Starship rocket. NPR News reports that SpaceX is currently conducting critical tests on a redesigned version of this massive vehicle. Starship is designed to be fully reusable, which Musk believes will significantly lower the cost of space travel. The company’s future depends heavily on this technology. According to the official IPO filing, any failure or delay in the development of Starship could limit the company's ability to grow. Franco Granda, a researcher at the data firm PitchBook, told NPR News that if the latest Starship test goes poorly, it could cause investor excitement to drop significantly.
paragraphs.zh: 這項財務計畫的核心是星艦（Starship）火箭。美國國家公共電台新聞（NPR News）報導，SpaceX 目前正在對這款巨型載具的重新設計版本進行關鍵測試。星艦的設計目標是完全可重複使用，馬斯克相信這將大幅降低太空旅行的成本。該公司的未來嚴重依賴這項技術。根據官方的首次公開募股文件，星艦開發的任何失敗或延遲都可能限制該公司的成長能力。數據公司 PitchBook 的研究員法蘭科·格蘭達（Franco Granda）告訴美國國家公共電台新聞，如果最新的星艦測試表現不佳，可能會導致投資人的熱情大幅下降。

paragraphs.en: SpaceX has bold plans for the future that go far beyond simple rocket launches. According to Deutsche Welle, Musk wants to build self-sustaining cities on Mars that could eventually house up to one million people. To support this, the company is looking at ways to mine resources on asteroids and the moon. Furthermore, the company has proposed a unique solution to the high energy needs of artificial intelligence (AI). By placing giant supercomputers in orbit, SpaceX hopes to use the cold vacuum of space and unlimited sunlight to run AI systems more efficiently than is possible on Earth.
paragraphs.zh: SpaceX 對未來有著大膽的計畫，遠不止於簡單的火箭發射。根據德國之聲（Deutsche Welle）報導，馬斯克希望在火星上建立可自我維持的城市，最終可容納多達一百萬人。為了支持這一目標，該公司正在研究如何在小行星和月球上開採資源。此外，該公司還提出了一種獨特的解決方案，以應對人工智慧（AI）對高能源的需求。透過將巨型超級電腦放置在軌道上，SpaceX 希望利用太空的寒冷真空和無限的陽光，比在地球上更有效率地運行人工智慧系統。

paragraphs.en: These plans are tied to the company's recent acquisition of xAI, an artificial intelligence firm also owned by Musk. According to BBC Business, SpaceX has already struck a deal with the AI company Anthropic. Under this agreement, Anthropic will pay $15 billion a year to access data centers in the American South for xAI. However, the company also faces several challenges. The IPO filing lists numerous legal issues, including claims regarding data privacy and copyright. Additionally, the company is dealing with lawsuits related to Grok, the chatbot created by xAI.
paragraphs.zh: 這些計畫與該公司最近收購 xAI 有關，xAI 也是馬斯克旗下的人工智慧公司。根據英國廣播公司商業新聞報導，SpaceX 已與人工智慧公司 Anthropic 達成協議。根據這項協議，Anthropic 將每年支付 150 億美元，以使用美國南部的資料中心供 xAI 使用。然而，該公司也面臨多項挑戰。首次公開募股文件列出了許多法律問題，包括有關資料隱私和版權的索賠。此外，該公司正在處理與 xAI 開發的聊天機器人 Grok 相關的訴訟。

paragraphs.en: If the IPO is successful, it will have a massive impact on the wealth of Elon Musk. Because he owns a large portion of the company, the high valuation could push his total net worth past $1 trillion. This would make him the first trillionaire in history. While Musk already holds significant wealth through companies like Tesla, the SpaceX listing is expected to be the final step in reaching this milestone. A special share structure ensures that Musk will keep control over the company's voting decisions, even after new investors join.
paragraphs.zh: 如果首次公開募股成功，將對伊隆·馬斯克的財富產生巨大影響。由於他擁有該公司很大一部分股份，高估值可能使他的總淨資產超過 1 兆美元。這將使他成為歷史上第一位兆萬富翁。儘管馬斯克已經透過特斯拉（Tesla）等公司擁有大量財富，但 SpaceX 的上市預計將是達成這一里程碑的最後一步。特殊的股權結構確保馬斯克即使在新投資人加入後，仍將掌控公司的投票決策。

paragraphs.en: As the company prepares for its market debut, the world is watching both its financial and technical progress. The combination of high-stakes rocket testing and the promise of a multi-planetary future makes this one of the most closely watched business events in recent years. Whether SpaceX can turn its science-fiction dreams into a profitable reality remains the biggest question for future shareholders. For now, the company must focus on proving that its technology is ready for the challenges of space, while managing the legal and financial pressures that come with being a public company.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著公司準備首次公開募股，全世界都在關注其財務和技術進展。高風險的火箭測試與多行星未來的承諾相結合，使這成為近年來最受關注的商業事件之一。SpaceX 能否將其科幻夢想轉變為有利可圖的現實，仍然是未來股東最大的疑問。目前，該公司必須專注於證明其技術已準備好應對太空挑戰，同時管理作為一家上市公司所帶來的法律和財務壓力。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To offer a company's shares for sale to the general public for the first time.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 上市（指公司首次公開發行股票）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 字面上容易誤解為「公開」，在商業語境下專指公司上市。文中：SpaceX, the aerospace company led by Elon Musk, has revealed plans to go public in the United States.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To allow new people or groups to enter or participate in something.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 敞開大門（指接納新成員或投資者）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡並非指實體的門，而是指接納外部投資者。文中：However, the new financial documents show that the business is now ready to open its doors to outside investors.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To reach or make an agreement or deal.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作「打擊」之意，這裡用於搭配 deal 表示達成協議。文中：According to BBC Business, SpaceX has already struck a deal with the AI company Anthropic.

keyTerms.definitionEn: The act of a company's shares being officially available for trading on a stock exchange.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 上市（指股票在交易所掛牌）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（列出清單），這裡作名詞指代公司上市的過程。文中：While Musk already holds significant wealth through companies like Tesla, the SpaceX listing is expected to be the final step in reaching this milestone.

sources.name: BBC Business
sources.title: SpaceX files for stock market debut that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire

sources.name: Deutsche Welle (DW) Top
sources.title: Will SpaceX's IPO fund life on Mars — and a trillionaire?

sources.name: NPR News
sources.title: A trillion dollar question: Will SpaceX's Starship launch go well?

quiz.question: According to the IPO filing, what is the primary risk associated with the Starship rocket project?

options.A: It has already caused a loss of $4.3 billion for the company.
options.B: Any failure or delay in its development could restrict the company's growth.
options.C: It is currently too expensive to manufacture for mass market appeal.
options.D: It is facing legal challenges regarding data privacy and copyright issues.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第三段，官方 IPO 文件明確指出 Starship 的開發若出現失敗或延遲，將會限制公司的成長能力。選項 A 錯誤，因為 43 億美元的虧損是公司整體的淨損，而非單指 Starship。選項 C 雖提到降低成本，但文中未提及製造成本過高導致無法吸引大眾。選項 D 指的是公司整體的法律問題，與 Starship 的技術開發風險分屬不同範疇。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about Elon Musk's future control over SpaceX after the IPO?

options.A: He will lose his majority voting power as new investors join the company.
options.B: He will likely step down as the leader to focus on his other companies like Tesla.
options.C: He will maintain his authority over company decisions despite selling shares to the public.
options.D: He will be forced to share decision-making power with the board of Anthropic.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第六段，文中提到「特殊股份結構（special share structure）」確保了即便在引入新投資者後，馬斯克仍能保有對公司投票決策的控制權。選項 A 與文中敘述矛盾。選項 B 文中並未提及他將辭職。選項 D 錯誤，Anthropic 是合作夥伴，並非負責 SpaceX 決策的董事會成員。

quiz.question: In the final paragraph, what does the phrase 'market debut' mean?

options.A: The first time a company's shares are available for public purchase.
options.B: The initial launch of a new rocket technology into space.
options.C: A celebration held for investors after a successful business year.
options.D: The formal announcement of a merger between two major companies.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。文中「market debut」是指公司進行 IPO（首次公開募股），即股票首次在公開市場上供大眾買賣的時刻。選項 B 混淆了航太術語與商業術語。選項 C 錯誤，這並非單純的慶祝活動。選項 D 錯誤，IPO 是上市行為，並非指公司合併。

quiz.question: What is the central theme of the article regarding SpaceX's IPO?

options.A: A detailed analysis of the technical specifications of the Starship rocket.
options.B: A report on the legal disputes between SpaceX and the company Anthropic.
options.C: An overview of Elon Musk's personal wealth and his goal to become a trillionaire.
options.D: A summary of SpaceX's transition to a public company, its ambitious goals, and the associated risks.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。整篇文章從 SpaceX 即將上市（IPO）切入，討論了公司目前的財務狀況、核心技術 Starship 的重要性、未來的宏大願景（如火星殖民與 AI 整合），以及面臨的法律與技術挑戰，涵蓋了文章的所有面向。選項 A、B、C 皆僅為文章中的部分細節，不足以代表全文主旨。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
